svg.text: Koe Pro v2 -- nRF5340 + DW3000 UWB Audio Board
45x30mm | 4-layer FR-4 | AK5720 ADC | PCM5102A DAC | MAX98357A Amp | nPM1300 PMIC
45x30mm | 4-layer | 61 parts | nRF5340 + DW3000 UWB + AK5720 ADC + PCM5102A DAC | BOM $23.05
USB-C 5V / LiPo 800mAh → nPM1300 PMIC (charger + buck + LDO) → 3.3V (all logic)
DW3000 UWB for sub-us time sync + ranging | AK5720 24-bit ADC + PCM5102A 32-bit DAC
